page_metadata.biotools__summary: Set of post-processing tools aimed at improving the taxonomical classification and at providing additional information to enhance metagenomics analyses. The developed tools provide additional proofs in the presence of low-abundant species, information of the mapping quality in coding and noncoding regions, etc.
